local function bxor(a,b) local r=0;for i=0,7 do local bit=2^i;if (a%2~=b%2) then r=r+bit end;a=math.floor(a/2);b=math.floor(b/2) end;return r end
local function _D(t,k)
local d=""
for i=1,#t do d=d..string.char(bxor(t[i],k)) end
return d
end
local function _L(s)
local executor = loadstring or load
if not executor then error("Executor not supported") end
local f,e = executor(s)
if f then return f() else error(e) end
end
local function _C()
